code: import React from'react';import{useNotes}from'../../context/NotesContext';import ExportButton from'./ExportButton';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const TopBar=_ref=>{let{note,onBack}=_ref;const{updateCurrentNoteLocally,saveCurrentNote}=useNotes();const handleSave=async()=>{if(note){try{await saveCurrentNote();}catch(error){console.error('Failed to save note:',error);}}};const handleTitleChange=title=>{if(note){updateCurrentNoteLocally({title});}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"top-bar",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"top-bar__left",children:[onBack&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"top-bar__btn top-bar__btn--back",onClick:onBack,children:"\u2190 Back"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"text",className:"top-bar__title",value:(note===null||note===void 0?void 0:note.title)||'',onChange:e=>handleTitleChange(e.target.value),placeholder:"Note title..."})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"top-bar__right",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"top-bar__btn top-bar__btn--save",onClick:handleSave,disabled:!note,title:"Save note (Ctrl+S)",children:"Save"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(ExportButton,{note:note})]})]});};export default TopBar;
